heading: View Custom Roles
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo list all custom database roles for your project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas customDbRoles list [options]

```To return the details for a single custom database role in the project you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas customDbRoles describe <roleName> [options]

```To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas customDbRoles list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-customDbRoles-list) and
[atlas customDbRoles describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-customDbRoles-describe).Related Links* [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

* [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo view custom roles through the Atlas Administration API,
see [Get All](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-listgroupcustomdbroleroles).**Ui:**Atlas UITo view your custom roles through the
Atlas UI:
